file_summary: This is a FastAPI router module that provides an '/ask' endpoint for querying project codebases. It defines request/response models, handles semantic search through an index, and uses DeepSeek API to generate answers based on retrieved code context.

line_windows.summary: This window covers the module imports, router setup, and Pydantic model definitions. Lines 1-5 import dependencies including FastAPI components, DeepSeek client, and search functionality. Lines 7-9 create the APIRouter. Lines 11-28 define three Pydantic models: AskRequest for incoming queries, SourceItem for search result metadata, and AskResponse for API responses. Lines 30-80 contain the main ask_question endpoint handler which validates input, searches the index, calls DeepSeek API, and formats the response.

This window contains the second half of the ask_question function and three helper functions. Lines 61-80 continue the ask_question function, handling DeepSeek API calls and constructing the final response with sources. Lines 82-101 define _build_prompt which formats retrieved code matches into a structured prompt for the LLM. Lines 103-112 define _read_project_metadata which loads project metadata from JSON files. Lines 114-125 define _ensure_index_files which checks for required index files and raises errors if missing.
